entries.summary: Phase 7 completed: Validation & Ranges fixes. Added shared config constants for chunk_size and max_tokens, updated AFOMIS.spec branding, standardized all documentation to use Qwen3-1.7B model references, updated deprecated GitHub Actions versions, and synchronized version numbers to 1.1.0 across all files.
top_rejection_reasons: Additional hardcoded values found after initial implementation
Documentation inconsistency - missed USAGE.md and other docs
lessons_learned: Shared constants should be used consistently across all files - reviewer found additional hardcoded values after initial implementation
Model name consistency requires checking ALL documentation files, not just the primary ones
Version numbers need to be updated across all files including API server, not just documentation
